title: Agent Output Schema — Keel AI-SDLC Handoff Contract

skill_version.description: Semantic version of the agent skill

story_id.description: Jira story or issue ID, or 'phase-1-init' for bootstrap runs

branch.description: Git branch name where agent wrote changes

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of agent completion

estimated_cost_usd.description: Execution cost in USD (wrapper-populated, never self-reported)

confidence.description: Confidence level derived by rule (never self-asserted). high = 0 findings AND coverage ≥ target AND fallback_triggered = false; medium = only LOW/INFO findings, or 1 coverage-retry occurred; low = any HIGH finding unresolved, fallback_triggered = true, or 2nd coverage-retry occurred.

fallback_triggered.description: True if fallback agent was invoked due to gaps or high-severity findings

status.description: success = all deliverables complete; partial = some deliverables with known gaps; blocked = unresolvable blocker

human_review_required.description: True if human review/approval needed before next lane

lane2_ready.description: True if output passes all gating criteria for downstream agent intake (Phase 2+). Never assume lane2_ready = true; explicit validation required.

sec_scan_ref.description: Reference to security scan output (e.g., SAST report URL, baseline comparison)

severity.description: HIGH = blocks release/lane2; MEDIUM = risk mitigatable in next lane; LOW = nice-to-have; INFO = observation

basis.description: verified = confirmed by test/scan; estimate = inferred (requires assumptions array)

assumptions.description: Required if basis='estimate'. State assumptions that, if wrong, invalidate the finding.

category.description: Category: code-quality, coverage-gap, security, performance, docs, architecture, test

file.description: Repo-relative path (optional if finding is global)

artifacts_read.description: Files read as context during execution

blocking_issues.description: Jira/GitHub issues blocking this execution or downstream lane2
